title: WIHP Chida Cholankhula Chopanda Malire
subtitle: Lembani mawu aliwonse → Tengani IPA kuchokera ku Wiktionary → Sinthani kukhala Hangul!
step2c: • Zonse zilankhulo 117 zokhala ndi thandizo la IPA 100%!
canConvert: Mutha kusintha mawu ochokera m'zilankhulo 117 padziko lapansi, kuphatikizapo zilankhulo za ku India zopitilira 20!
philosophy: Mawu sayenera kukhala ndi malire. WIHP ikuthokoza Wiktionary IPA.
